title: Kapalbhati
author: Yoga
description: Kapalbhati Pranayama — skull-shining breath. Inhale deeply using your diaphragm to expand the chest and abdomen, then rapidly draw the abdomen back to expel the air. The exhale is active; the inhale is passive.

steps.label: Prepare
steps.text: Sit tall, hands on knees. Breathe normally.
